name: Banana-Fudge Walnut Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease the bottom only of an 8-inch square pan.
3. Melt butter and chocolate chips in a 2-quart saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly.
4. Add all other ingredients to the melted butter and chocolate mixture and stir thoroughly until combined.
5. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for about 30 minutes or until the center is set.
7. Cut the brownies into 2-inch squares.
